name: In Los Angeles, where do I file against Perplexity?
description: NY federal or CA; NY sticking.[1][4]

mainEntity.name: In Los Angeles, where do I file against Perplexity?

acceptedAnswer.text: NY federal or CA; NY sticking.[1][4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Federal court in Central CA District possible, but NY Southern preferred due to jurisdiction wins.[1][4] Key factors: Where Perplexity incorporated/employees. Transfer motions fail.[4] LA creators use NY. Multi-district potential.
